description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Fix and Chips CMS 1.0 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) id parameter in (a) delete-announce.php; the (2) Announcement form field in (b) staff.php; the (3) Client Name, (4) Business Name, (5) Street, (6) Address 2, (7) Town/City, (8) Postcode, (9) Phone Number, (10) Email Address and (11) Website Address form fields in (c) new_customer.php; and unspecified fields in (d) search.php and (e) client-results.php.
